sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the board looks the same as before. The clicks didn't seem to change anything. The green blocks are still there. The centers of remaining green blocks are:
- Top row: (27, 45), (27, 51) - right side
- Bottom row: (33, 15), (33, 21), (33, 27), (33, 33), (33, 39), (33, 45), (33, 51) - full width
Wait, looking at the image more carefully, I see the green blocks are arranged in 2 rows. The top row has blocks on the right side (2 blocks visible), and the bottom row has blocks across the full width (7 blocks).
The previous clicks were at row 27, which is the top row of green blocks. But the remaining green blocks at row 27 are at cols 45 and 51 (right side). The clicks at cols 34, 28, 22, 16 didn't hit any remaining green blocks because those positions are already cleared.
I need to click on the remaining green blocks at their actual positions:
- Top row: (27, 45), (27, 51)
- Bottom row: (33, 15), (33, 21), (33, 27), (33, 33), (33, 39), (33, 45), (33, 51)
Let me click on these positions to clear them.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: Clicks missed remaining green blocks. 9 green blocks remain: 2 at top row (right), 7 at bottom row (full width). Need to click at correct positions.
Plan: Click on remaining green blocks at their actual center positions.
